athlete_profile: Age: 29, Sex: Female, Height: 170 cm, Weight: 63 kg. Ran consistently for 2 years (best 5K 26:00), then stopped for ~12 months. Coming back over the last 3 weeks with short run/walk sessions. VO2max ~44 mL/kg/min (likely detrained), resting HR 60 bpm, HRV 50 ms. No injuries but cardio feels much harder than before.
default_user_message: I used to run a 26-minute 5K but after a year off everything feels so hard and I get out of breath quickly. How do I come back without hurting myself or getting discouraged?
